title: BlockDropRandomizer
description: This plugin/mod turns every Minecraft world into a unique random‑drop challenge where each block-type drops a  random Item.
body:
# BlockRandomizer – Global Block Drop Randomizer
**BlockRandomizer** is a lightweight plugin/mod project that transforms every Minecraft world into a unique random‑drop gamble. Every block type generates a fixed, seed‑dependent item — meaning that on one world seed, stone might always drop diamonds, while on another seed it could consistently drop iron swords. The result is a fully reproducible randomizer experience where every world becomes its own puzzle.

Unlike traditional random‑drop projects, BlockRandomizer ensures that every block always drops the same item, no matter how often or where it is broken. Even hand‑breaking works, allowing players to obtain items from blocks that normally require tools. All drops are calculated using an algorithm based solely on the world seed and block type, guaranteeing identical results across servers, worlds, and playthroughs.

## Downloads
- [Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/blockdroprandomizer/versions?l=bukkit&l=folia&l=paper&l=purpur&l=spigot)
- [Fabric-Mod](https://modrinth.com/plugin/blockdroprandomizer/versions?l=fabric)

## Commands

Here are the **only** commands you need:
- /blockrandomizer start                     | _start the randomizer_
- /blockrandomizer stop               | _stop the randomizer_
- /blockrandomizer new            | _assigns new drop to every block (it is no longer seed‑bound)_

## Compatibility

The project ensures compatibility with other plugins/mods and avoids conflicts with custom loot systems. The project requires no configuration, works instantly on installation, and is ideal for challenge servers, YouTube series, or chaotic survival worlds.

## Platform Support

### Plugin-Version
> _The plugin was developed for Minecraft 1.21.11, successfully tested on 1.21.8, and is fully compatible with all 1.21.x versions due to stable API behavior across the entire release line. The plugin runs flawlessly on Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, Purpur, and Folia._

### Mod-Version
> _The mod was developed for Minecraft 1.21.11, successfully tested on 1.21.8, and is fully compatible with all 1.21.x versions due to stable API behavior across the entire release line. The mod runs flawlessly on fabric._
